Meaning.En: at or to an earlier time than; earlier than (a particular event or time)
Meaning.Example: She arrived before the meeting started.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả thời điểm xảy ra trước một sự kiện cụ thể.
Situation.En: Used to indicate that one event happens earlier than another.

Situation.Vi: Trong lịch trình hoặc trình tự công việc.
Situation.En: Used in scheduling or procedural sequences (e.g., “Review the draft before submitting it.”).

Meaning.Example: I had seen him before, but I couldn’t recall his name.

Situation.Vi: Khi nhắc lại kinh nghiệm hoặc sự kiện trong quá khứ.
Situation.En: Used to refer to something that happened in the past, especially in contrast to the present.

Meaning.En: earlier than the time at which; prior to the occurrence of
Meaning.Example: Make sure to save your work before the computer shuts down.

Situation.Vi: Điều kiện cần xảy ra trước một hành động chính.
Situation.En: Used to express a necessary prior action or condition.
